new_findings.finding: PR #914 rag.operation__recall hint successfully fixed the wrong-action-name attractor (LLM now calls rag.operation__recall not operation__recall). However the scenario still lands I because: (1) no indexed sources exist for the agent at run time, (2) the tool returns missing_required_arg for 'sources', (3) LLM asks user for sources rather than reporting 'no indexed sources found'. Scenario design may need a pre-indexed source fixture or rubric clarification to reach V.

S9 remains R despite PR #914 must_emit_any relaxation. The LLM handles the first turn via inline chat reply (asks for name) correctly, but on receiving the name in turn 2 it asks again rather than routing to skill_builder. routing_decided and skill_run_spawned never emit across either turn. The inline-clarification path is being taken but the skill_builder is not triggered. This may be a router instruction issue — skill_builder needs to be triggered after the user provides the name.
